name: KisanTech
peopleReachedDefinition: Estimated as smallholder farmers served (8,400) × average household size of 4.5 persons, based on India NSS 2021 rural household data. Includes farming household members who directly benefit from improved yields and income.
householdsReachedDefinition: Equal to the 'Smallholder Farmers Served' output indicator (8,400). Each farmer represents one household. Based on unique farmer account registrations.
jobsCreatedDefinition: Full-time equivalent (FTE) jobs directly created by KisanTech operations: 30 field agents, 20 tech and data analysts, 15 operations and administrative staff. Verified through payroll and contractor records.

outputs.label: Smallholder Farmers Served
outputs.fullName: Smallholder Farmers Receiving Advisory Services (IRIS+ PI4060)
outputs.methodology: Unique farmer accounts with at least one advisory session in the reporting period

outputs.label: Hectares Under Management
outputs.methodology: Sum of georeferenced farm plots registered on the platform and receiving active advisory
outputs.source: GIS mapping and farmer registration data

outputs.label: Crop Advisory Sessions
outputs.methodology: Cumulative count of completed advisory sessions (mobile app + SMS) since fund inception

outputs.label: People Reached
outputs.fullName: Total individuals in smallholder farming households served by KisanTech platform
outputs.methodology: Derived from registered farmers multiplied by average household size of 4.5 persons (India National Family Health Survey data)
outputs.source: Platform registration data and NFHS survey

outputs.label: Jobs Created
outputs.fullName: Direct full-time equivalent jobs created through KisanTech operations
outputs.methodology: Count of full-time equivalent positions created directly by the company, verified quarterly through payroll records

outcomes.label: Crop Yield Improvement
outcomes.fullName: Average Crop Yield Improvement vs Baseline
outcomes.methodology: Comparison of yield per hectare at baseline (pre-enrollment) vs current season across matched sample of 500 farmers
outcomes.source: Crop cutting experiments and self-reported yields

outcomes.label: Farmer Income Increase
outcomes.methodology: Self-reported income surveys (n=500), validated against crop sales records from aggregators

outcomes.label: Post-Harvest Loss Reduction
outcomes.methodology: Measured weight loss between harvest and market sale, compared to baseline assessment at enrollment
outcomes.source: Random sample weighing at farm gate and market (n=300)

outcomes.label: CO₂ Avoided
outcomes.fullName: Estimated carbon dioxide emissions avoided through improved agricultural practices
outcomes.methodology: Estimated using IPCC Tier 1 emission factors for reduced synthetic fertilizer use, improved water management, and decreased post-harvest losses. Baseline emissions established from pre-intervention farming practices.
outcomes.source: Project M&E system with IPCC emission factor calculations

outcomes.label: Women Beneficiary %
outcomes.fullName: Percentage of total beneficiaries who are female
outcomes.methodology: Calculated from sex-disaggregated farmer registration data on the KisanTech platform

financials.label: Revenue
financials.fullName: Semi-annual gross revenue from platform subscriptions and advisory services
financials.methodology: Gross revenue on accrual basis per IFRS 15. Includes platform subscription fees, premium advisory service revenue, and data analytics licensing.
financials.source: Audited financial statements and management accounts

financials.label: Valuation
financials.fullName: Fair market value of the fund's equity position
financials.methodology: Fair market value via DCF and comparable transactions, reviewed quarterly by valuation committee.
financials.source: Independent valuation report and management estimate

financials.label: Capital Deployed
financials.fullName: Total committed capital called and deployed
financials.methodology: Cumulative capital called from LPs per subscription agreement.

financials.label: IRR
financials.fullName: Gross internal rate of return on invested capital
financials.methodology: Time-weighted gross IRR via XIRR method per GIPS standards.

financials.label: Revenue Growth
financials.methodology: YoY revenue growth = (Current - Prior Year Same Period) / Prior Year × 100.

profile.description: KisanTech delivers AI-powered crop advisory services and precision agriculture tools to smallholder farmers across South India. The platform combines satellite imagery, soil sensors, and local weather data to provide actionable recommendations via mobile app and SMS.
profile.theoryOfChange: By providing smallholder farmers with precision agriculture tools and real-time advisory services, KisanTech improves crop yields, reduces post-harvest losses, and increases farmer incomes. Better farming practices also reduce input costs (fertilizer, pesticide) and promote sustainable land management, contributing to food security and climate resilience.
profile.targetBeneficiaries: Smallholder farmers (1-5 hectare landholdings) in semi-arid and rain-fed agricultural zones of Karnataka, Maharashtra, and Andhra Pradesh, with a focus on women farmers and farmer producer organizations.
profile.geographicFocus: South India — Karnataka (Dharwad, Belgaum), Maharashtra (Nashik, Aurangabad), and Andhra Pradesh (Anantapur, Kurnool). Active in 8 districts across 3 states.
profile.implementationApproach: B2B2C model working through farmer producer organizations (FPOs) and agri-input dealers. Field agents provide on-ground training, while the platform delivers personalized crop advisories through a multilingual mobile app.
profile.reportingFrequency: Semi-annual (H1/H2), aligned with Kharif and Rabi cropping seasons. Quarterly data quality reviews with third-party agricultural economists.
